title: tithymalus antiquorus
intro: Tithymalus antiquorus, also known as Euphorbia antiquorum, is a succulent plant species native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly due to the presence of latex in its stems, which contains euphorbines with anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Tithymalus antiquorus include its potential to treat various health issues such as wounds, burns, and skin infections, as well as its use in traditional remedies for digestive issues and fever reduction. Herbal preparations of Tithymalus antiquorus can be made by extracting the latex from its stems, which can then be used to create topical ointments, creams, and salves.
